actions.name: 采购历史
actions.caption: 采购历史
actions.expression:
SELECT cghtsheet.sid,
       cght.hthm,
       cght.wxht,
       cght.sccj,
       cght.sccj1,
       cght.htrq,
       cght.jhrq,
       cght.ywry,
       cght.hbdm,
       cghtsheet.cgjg,
       cghtsheet.cgsl,
       cghtsheet.jldw,
       cghtsheet.zje
FROM cght,cghtsheet 
WHERE (cght.rid=cghtsheet.pid) 
  AND (cght.xjht="新") 
  AND (cght.cgsh<>"123") 
  AND (cghtsheet.cpbh=[采购合同.产品资料.产品编号]) 
  AND (cghtsheet.bjhh=[采购合同.产品资料.专业货号]) 
  AND permission('采购合同') 
ORDER BY cghtsheet.sid DESC

actions.name: 出货情况
actions.caption: 出货情况
actions.expression:
SELECT cymxsheet.sid,
       cymx.fphm,
       cymx.hxdh,
       cymx.hwzt,
       cymxsheet.chsl,
       cymxsheet.jldw,
       cymxsheet.gcjg,
       cymxsheet.gczj
FROM cymx,cymxsheet 
WHERE (cymx.rid=cymxsheet.pid) 
  AND (cymx.chyrq>"1999-01-01") 
  AND (cymxsheet.cght=[采购合同.合同号码]) 
  AND ((cymxsheet.cpbh=[采购合同.产品资料.产品编号]) 
  OR (cymxsheet.cpbh=[采购合同.产品资料.专业货号])) 
  AND (cymxsheet.ywrya=[采购合同.采购人员]) 
ORDER BY cymxsheet.sid DESC

view.params:
SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.ryxm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.bm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.yhm=:_user_username_)
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT bgmxd.fphm,bgmxd.SID
FROM bgmxd
WHERE   permission('报关明细')
ORDER BY bgmxd.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID,
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%跟单%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%验货%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC
